description: Style Notelucera, or ‘luminous star’ in Spanish, is designed for fashionistas who like to shine! Lucera fashion jewellery offers contemporary designs to complement the various moods of the modern and fashion conscious woman of today.Product DetailsA silver inverted trident shape pendant with CZ diamonds and a sapphire blue stone in the centre  Material and CareSilverWipe with a damp swob to remove dust
